name: Kowloon My City
overview:
In the fading heart of Kowloon City, three brothers fight to save their family’s mahjong parlor as old debts, lost love, and family secrets collide.

The eldest son of Hu family is incompetent & the second son too playful. Their third son, Sanyuan, is left with the family burdens & must revitalize the mahjong parlor & pay off his father's debts.

trailers.title: [Promo] Astro Qj On Demand • KOWLOON MY CITY
